description: John 'Van Healen' Kask is one of SWATs best tactical defence units and on-site military paramedics. He also shreds a mean guitar—sometimes mid-operation. He says it helps get his teammates' blood pumping just as effectively as an AED, which he keeps ready in case of emergency. I can bring you back to life, but I can't make you live.
name: John 'Van Healen' Kask | SWAT
